spec_match.rationale: Nine cards in visual order != DOM order with reading-flow toggling tab/AT traversal.

interactive.rationale: Single toggle but no tab-traversal visualisation; user must press Tab themselves.

edge_cases.rationale: Single layout, single toggle — no auto/normal comparison.

references.rationale: Page has NO references / see-also section.

design_system.rationale: Raw hex #d4f5e2 and #fde8e8 for card bgs.

openQuestions.title: Surface tab order live
openQuestions.detail: Add a Walk button that focuses each card programmatically.

summary: Clear visual demo but missing references and uses raw hex.
